name: Vegan Almond Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Blend all ingredients except crust and almonds in a food processor until smooth and creamy.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Top with slivered almonds.
5. Bake for about 45 minutes or until cracks start to form on the edge of the filling.
